judge_result.notes: Artefact demonstrates the expected knowledge graph specification with node/edge type tables, statistics, a sample subgraph, JSON-LD context, and a Supabase/PostgreSQL JSONB schema with example query — covering all three target implementations named in the description. Australian spelling ('specialisations') appears in the schema. The second judge criterion was truncated in the prompt but the artefact clearly includes canonical sections, so it is treated as met.
